strategy_canvas.headline_thesis: Elitez wins on bench_scale + retention + field_force_tech + multilingual_depth — a four-axis break from both the SG-local Excel-WhatsApp cluster and the Smollan-class global incumbents who outsell on global MSA but cannot match SG-pure bench depth or pricing.

segments.name: MNC Beauty Tier-1 (L'Oréal-class)
segments.descriptor: Cosmetics MNC running multi-portfolio counter merch (CPD/LUXE/PPD/ACD) across Watsons + Guardian + dept-store beauty counters

segments.name: MNC Personal & Household Care
segments.descriptor: Unilever-class personal care + household running supermarket + pharmacy merch across SG modern trade

segments.name: MNC Beverage + Liquor
segments.descriptor: Pernod Ricard / Suntory / Diageo class running supermarket promo compliance + on-trade activation across SG

segments.name: MNC Food + Dairy
segments.descriptor: Gardenia / Suntory / Fresenius Kabi class running supermarket merch + NPI launches in modern trade

segments.name: Retail House-Brand (FairPrice / DFI)
segments.descriptor: Retailer-side house-brand merch with conflict-of-interest segregation

segments.name: SG Mid-Market + Indie Brands
segments.descriptor: Series A-C indie FMCG (Oatside-class) needing 1-3 pax outlet coverage, PSG-aware

segments.name: Regional SEA Bundle Buyer
segments.descriptor: Regional MNC director consolidating SG + MY + TH (+/- VN/PH) field execution on single vendor

segments.name: MNC Pharma + OTC
segments.descriptor: Pharma OTC + medical-nutrition (Fresenius-class) running pharmacy + clinic-channel merch with regulated-product compliance

segments.name: Distributor-Managed Brand
segments.descriptor: Brand whose SG distribution is via 3rd-party distributor; merch is contracted to/through the distributor's bench

needs.name: ISO / PDPA / Cyber Essentials procurement gate

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Holds global L'Oréal/Reckitt MSAs that flow SG bench from regional pool; lock-in via HQ procurement, not local fit.

competitors.name: DKSH Smollan (JV)
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Distribution + dedicated-merch bundle blocks brands already on DKSH distribution from switching merch-only.

competitors.name: RSG Retail Solutions
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Mid-tier SG dedicated-model focus on personal care; weaker at LUXE counter-staff Mandarin fluency than tier-1 plays.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Smollan FieldX deployed across L'Oréal SEA; mature but tied to global product roadmap not SG-local needs.

competitors.name: Trax Retail
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Image-recognition replaces counter-audit cycles; SaaS-only — brand still needs an agency for counter staff.

competitors.name: RSG Retail Solutions
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Mandarin counter-bench available; Bahasa depth shallow — cannot cover HDB-heartland Watsons + luxe counters together.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Global SLA but SG-pool retention is regional avg; replacement cycle slower than SG-local equivalent.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Inherits global ISO 27001 + GDPR posture; over-engineered for SG PDPA but satisfies L'Oréal CISO procurement gate.

competitors.name: DKSH Smollan (JV)
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Distribution-grade ERP + compliance pre-vetted by L'Oréal/Unilever HQ; reduces SG procurement friction.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Global L'Oréal MSA spans 6+ APAC markets via Smollan operations — single source SG-MY-TH-VN-PH.

competitors.name: DKSH Smollan (JV)
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: DKSH-Smollan footprint covers same SEA-6 markets with distribution integration on top.

competitors.name: Luen Thai Marketing Services
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: HK-anchored cross-border into SG + TW; weaker SEA-6 spread but strong Greater Bay coordination for HK-listed brands.

competitors.name: Edge Marketing
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Beauty niche depth in SG dept-store + pharmacy counters; cannot scale across full LUXE/PPD/ACD at L'Oréal volume.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: FieldX exports to Tableau used by L'Oréal regional analytics; PowerBI parity exists but native integration weaker.

competitors.name: Salesforce Consumer Goods Cloud
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Native Tableau integration is unmatched but requires brand to fully deploy Salesforce CG stack — 6-12 mo implementation.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Unilever 'One Trade' global MSA includes SG; pool-deployed bench at SG MNC roster price premium.

competitors.name: RSG Retail Solutions
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Mid-tier dedicated-model focus on personal care + household categories; SG-local cost base.

competitors.name: Engage Marketing Services
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Bundled trade-marketing + merch story aligned to personal care brand managers' KPI sheets.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: FieldX on Unilever EDGE integration; mature but tied to global roadmap.

competitors.name: Trax Retail
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Heineken, Henkel reference deployments include Unilever-adjacent personal care; image-recognition replaces audit time.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Global SLA but SG-pool retention regional avg; weaker than SG-pure bench.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Unilever EDGE / Tableau native; PowerBI bridge via Smollan reporting layer.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Global posture inherited; Unilever Climate Transition Action Plan Tier-2 audit ready.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Pernod Ricard APAC MSA via Smollan; SG pool serves but smaller than personal-care vertical depth.

competitors.name: RSG Retail Solutions
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Promoter bench works for beverages but limited liquor-licence compliance training depth.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: FieldX usable but promo-compliance window tracking weaker than EMR-Intel's daily refresh.

competitors.name: Salesforce Consumer Goods Cloud
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Pernod Ricard reportedly on Salesforce CG; Tableau bridges seamlessly but full stack adoption needed.

competitors.name: RSG Retail Solutions
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Mid-tier dedicated capability with FairPrice/Sheng Siong relationships in F&B category.

competitors.name: FMCG Link
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: F&B category coverage in SG supermarket channel — solid but no proprietary tech.

competitors.name: Trax Retail
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Coca-Cola + Heineken reference deployments overlap F&B/dairy HQ analytics; data-layer replaces audit bench.

competitors.name: Trax Retail
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: API-first, sinks into PowerBI / Tableau cleanly but requires brand to license Trax separately on top of bench agency.

competitors.name: FairPrice Group Internal Merchandising
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Inside the retailer — direct planogram + replenishment access; external agency cannot match house-brand priority.

competitors.name: RSG Retail Solutions
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Sequestered agency contract option; can run conflict-segregated bench for retailer house-brand at SG-local rates.

competitors.name: FairPrice Group Internal Merchandising
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Inherits retailer-side compliance posture; PDPA scope handled by NTUC Enterprise group governance.

competitors.name: FairPrice Group Internal Merchandising
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Direct access to retailer loyalty card SKU velocity feeding internal BI; external agency cannot replicate this depth.

competitors.name: SMT Retailtainment
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Activation-style shared crews work for short campaigns but lack sustained always-on shared retainer model.

competitors.name: Freelance supervisor + gig-platform merchandisers
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Lowest unit cost when intermittent; quality variance kills brand-consistency for Series-B brands with investor optics.

competitors.name: Repsly
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Published per-user pricing fits founder budgets but tooling-only — founder still needs to hire promoters separately.

competitors.name: DIY — Excel + WhatsApp + Supervisor
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Founder defaults to lightweight stack; works at <3 outlet scale but breaks at growth-stage 10+ outlet expansion.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Global Unilever/L'Oréal MSAs flow through Smollan SEA-6 ops; single-vendor consolidation already operational.

competitors.name: DKSH Smollan (JV)
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Distribution + merch bundle across SG/MY/TH/VN/PH/ID; single-invoice consolidation is the structural lock-in.

competitors.name: Luen Thai Marketing Services
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: HK + SG + MY + TW footprint; sub-SEA-6 but strong Greater Bay coordination niche.

competitors.name: Spire Research & Consulting (Trade Marketing Practice)
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Pan-Asia audit + consulting reach; not sustained bench, supports strategy-side decisions on SEA bundle.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Pan-APAC FieldX aggregation feeds Tableau but each market reports separately before regional roll-up.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Global posture inherited across markets; PDPA + Malaysia PDPA + Indonesia PDP cross-coverage.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: FieldX standardised across SEA markets; mature multi-country product.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Pharma OTC adjacent to existing personal-care MSAs; not pharma-specialised on its own.

competitors.name: CDM Smollan Asia
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Global compliance covers PDPA but pharma-specific HSA / dispensing rules not pre-vetted.

competitors.name: DKSH Smollan (JV)
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: DKSH is the distributor in many SG cases — bench naturally tied to the distribution contract.

competitors.name: FMCG Link
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Sub-contracts to local distributors; SG-local bench picks up the field-execution leg.

competitors.name: SMT Retailtainment
competitors.specialisation_for_cell: Sampling/activation bursts work for distributor-led campaigns when retailer slot opens episodically.

attack_plans.icp: Series A-C SG indie FMCG founders + growth-stage GMs (Oatside-class oat-milk, indie beauty, F&B challengers) entering modern trade with 1-3 outlet groups; PSG-eligible and conscious of dedicated-team minimums.
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: ~250 SG mid-market FMCG brands (ACRA SSIC 46 + 47 active-entity filter for Series-A+ scale) of which ~80 actively running modern-trade merch via gig-platform + freelance supervisor. At SGD 9k/mo retainer × 12 = SGD 108k/yr per buyer × 80 buyers + 30% conversion of remaining cohort over 24 months → ~SGD 12M annual.
attack_plans.why_gap: Tier-1 dedicated agencies (Smollan-CDM, Engage, RSG) all have ~15-pax bench minimums that exceed indie-brand outlet coverage; SG-local micro-agencies don't have shared-bench economics or field-force tech. The shared 6-pax model collapses minimums to 1-2 pax of effective coverage while still providing supervisor + tech + EMR-Intel — no SG competitor combines all three.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Elitez 350+ bench depth lets the shared pool rotate across many brands without dedicated-style lock-in; EMR-Intel mobile + BI provides the procurement-gate qualifier indie agencies lack; PSG eligibility (once EMR-Intel pre-approved) makes effective price SGD 4,500/mo — at parity with gig-platform freelance load but with retention SLA + free replacement.

gtm.channel: SG F&B Founders Slack + indie-beauty community + EnterpriseSG accelerator partners + Oatside-class case studies. Direct outreach via Elitez's existing SG Pte Ltd customer-referrer network. Companion deck: 'How a Series-B brand covered 8 outlets for SGD 4,500/mo net after PSG.'
gtm.pitch: Cover 1-3 outlet groups across FairPrice + Watsons + Cold Storage without paying for a dedicated team you won't fully use. Same tech, same retention, half the buy-in.
gtm.pricing: SGD 9,000/mo retainer; SGD 4,500/mo effective after PSG. Replaces SGD 7,200/mo gig + supervisor + founder-coordination stack.
content: Case study: 'A Series-B oat-milk brand and 8 outlets — the SGD 9k playbook' (PDF + dashboard screenshots)
TCO calculator (Notion-embeddable widget): 'Shared bench vs gig platform vs in-house — your numbers'
PSG application walkthrough video (5 min) — exact steps for indie founders to claim the 50% grant
EMR-Intel mobile-app teardown — 60-second showcase of attendance + planogram + photo upload
Indie-brand procurement checklist — what FairPrice category managers want to see from a new brand's field execution

attack_plans.icp: L'Oréal-tier beauty KAMs running LUXE/PPD/ACD counter staff at Watsons + Guardian + department-store beauty counters across SG; need Mandarin + Bahasa counter conversion fluency and procurement-gate compliance.
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: Estimated ~400 counter-staff equivalent across SG beauty MNC roster (L'Oréal CPD+LUXE+PPD+ACD ~60 pax, Shiseido ~30, Coty ~25, smaller MNCs ~40; balance includes Unilever Beauty etc.). At SGD 4,800/pax/mo × 12 × ~30% addressable share-take through Smollan/RSG displacement (Y1-2 horizon) = ~SGD 18M annual.
attack_plans.why_gap: Tier-1 global incumbents (Smollan-CDM) score 5 on bench but only 3 on multilingual counter depth (their bench is regional-pool, not SG-pure with Mandarin/Bahasa depth); SG-local agencies (RSG, Engage) have language depth but score 1-2 on field-force tech, failing the procurement gate. No competitor combines (a) SG-pure multilingual bench, (b) EMR-Intel-grade BI + procurement-gate compliance, and (c) tier-1 price discipline.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Elitez bench is 5 on bench_scale, 5 on multilingual_depth, 5 on field_force_tech, 5 on compliance_posture — the only four-axis 5-score on the canvas. Existing L'Oréal counter contract (CPD/LUXE/PPD/ACD) is the proof point; expansion is incremental win-back from Smollan in LUXE + ACD segments where MSA renewals come up 2026-Q3.

gtm.channel: Direct outreach via Jack Wang's existing L'Oréal SG relationships; case-study syndication to Shiseido + Coty + Unilever Beauty SG KAMs at 2026-Q3 industry events (BeautyCon SEA, CosmoProf Asia). Procurement-gate audit deck against Smollan-CDM MSA showing line-by-line capability parity + price + retention delta.
gtm.pitch: Smollan-class procurement gate + ISO/PDPA compliance, SG-pure multilingual bench, free replacement — SGD ~1,000/pax below Smollan-CDM regional rate, with monthly retention SLA in writing.
gtm.pricing: SGD 4,500-4,800/pax/mo loaded dedicated; SGD ~5,500 enterprise tier with category-trained beauty counter staff. Procurement gate satisfied via existing certifications.
content: Smollan-CDM displacement audit template — line-by-line capability + price comparison
Multilingual counter conversion case study — Mandarin/Bahasa counter staff at Watsons HDB-heartland outlets (with conversion uplift numbers)
Free promoter-replacement SLA whitepaper — what 'free replacement' actually contracts for (response times + qualification standards)
EMR-Intel BI dashboard demo recording (8 min) for L'Oréal-class procurement reviews
Counter-attrition cost calculator — 'What 2 missed outlet-weeks in CNY cost you in 2025'

attack_plans.niche_name: Group SEA bundle vs Smollan global MSA
attack_plans.icp: Regional SEA trade-marketing/commercial directors at MNC FMCG (Unilever, Reckitt, Coty, Pernod Ricard) based in SG, consolidating SG + MY (+ TH/VN/PH) field execution onto a single vendor — currently defaulting to Smollan-CDM or DKSH-Smollan global MSA.
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: Estimated 35-45 MNC regional SEA brands with SG-decision + multi-country execution at ~SGD 1.2M annual SEA-bundle spend each (60-80 pax avg × SGD 4,800 blended × 12 × ~40% addressable from Smollan/DKSH share). 40 × SGD 1.2M × 15% share-take = SGD 7.2M Y1, growing to ~SGD 24M annual at maturity by Y3.
attack_plans.why_gap: Smollan-CDM and DKSH-Smollan dominate this segment (both score 5 on cross-border SEA), but their pricing is regional-MSA premium (~20-30% above SG-local) and their SG bench is pool-sourced not SG-pure. Pure-SG agencies score 1 on cross-border. No mid-priced competitor offers SG-decision quality + SEA execution under one Pte Ltd account ownership.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Elitez Group's existing 9-office SEA footprint (incl. MY entity) removes the entity-setup cost barrier — Y3 SOM stack reserves SGD 1.6M for MY pilot at near-zero entity overhead. SG-decision + Elitez-Group SEA execution + consolidated invoicing + unified EMR-Intel BI is a structural Y2-Y3 wedge no SG-local rival has and no Smollan-class incumbent can match on price.

gtm.channel: EDB SG MNC HQ relationship channels (~4,200 regional HQs in SG per EDB 2025). Direct outreach via Elitez Group senior directors to MNC regional commercial/CMOs. Co-marketed case studies with first regional reference customer (Y2). Speaker presence at MNC SEA Trade Marketing Council (annual industry event).
gtm.pitch: Replace your Smollan-CDM regional MSA with SG-decision quality + SEA-wide execution under one Pte Ltd account, single invoice, unified BI — at SGD 300-700/pax/mo below your current MSA rate.
gtm.pricing: Regional bundle SGD 5,200/pax/mo SG benchmark; MY/TH/VN/PH priced to local cost base (~SGD 800-1,500/pax/mo equivalent). Consolidated quarterly invoicing.
content: Regional MSA displacement playbook — how to migrate from Smollan-CDM in 90 days without execution gaps
Cross-country EMR-Intel unified BI dashboard demo (multi-market scorecard view)
Reference case study: SG-to-MY pilot with one Series-B FMCG brand (Y2 proof-point)
Regional SEA TCO calculator — Smollan-CDM vs Elitez Group bundle line-item view
Procurement deck template for MNC procurement consolidation reviews (matches Unilever 'One Trade' / L'Oréal SEA roster review formats)
